comparison_vs_712.schema_hypothesis_status: still_incomplete — possible explanations: (a) thread fetch returns the schema but SPA discards it because of an unrelated field gate (e.g. block_meta, status, query_str), (b) ~2.1KB body may match envelope size but not the exact field shape required by ThreadEntryContext renderer, (c) SSE final message in /sse stream is what actually drives the warning bubble — replicating only in /rest/thread is insufficient.
